refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, detect obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed into specific analysis tasks to clarify the scope and enable targeted design solutions for terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a worksite model/map that includes terrain contours, obstacle locations, and delineated work-zone boundaries, validated against ground truth data.
sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite
Represent the work-zone boundaries and features accurately

candidate_dps: Terrain analysis algorithm using LIDAR and sensor fusion
Obstacle detection and classification using computer vision and sensor data
Work-zone mapping and representation using GIS-based modeling
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated sensor fusion and GIS-based modeling for terrain, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection modules
GIS model integration with sensor data streams
coupling_check.notes: The integrated approach reduces interface complexity and supports consistent data representation across sub-functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-quality sensor data (LIDAR, cameras)
Risk of sensor data latency affecting real-time mapping accuracy
High safety criticality requires robust fault detection and fail-safe operation
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data processing to isolate faults and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and modeling of worksite mapping functions including terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, cameras) from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation for planning and execution

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Issues alerts related to detected obstacles or unsafe terrain conditions to Safety Services

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the module centralizes mapping functions; low diffusion due to limited external dependencies.
Lower containment as Vehicle mainly consumes mapping data; higher diffusion if mapping logic were embedded here.
Moderate containment; mapping data used for teleoperation but not generated here.
Minimal containment; only receives alerts, no mapping logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the worksite mapping functions within the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex
Risk of delayed updates if sensor data processing is not optimized
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate partitioning sensor data preprocessing into submodules within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping from terrain, obstacle, and work-zone analysis to integrated sensor fusion and GIS modeling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution
Potential complexity risk if NGHE Solution module scope grows without internal modularization
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support the assignment of mapping functions to NGHE Solution; external interfaces are well-defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the integrated worksite model output against known site data and validating interface data flows.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to DP and IM with explicit interface definitions supports traceability and ownership.

recommended_revisions: Consider further decomposition of NGHE Solution module to manage complexity and improve maintainability.
Plan for fault detection and recovery mechanisms given high safety criticality.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the requirements with acceptable risk and clear ownership. No immediate need to zigzag or revise at this level.
next_level_sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite
Represent the work-zone boundaries and features accurately

revise.why: Current FR, DP, and IM assignments are consistent and feasible.

assumptions: High-quality sensor data is available and reliable
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated processing load
open_risks: Sensor data latency and accuracy impacting real-time mapping
Complexity management within NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of sensor fusion and GIS modeling algorithms
Verification test results of worksite model accuracy and update rates
